attributes.action: Student loans must be more lenient and accessible to our youth
attributes.additional_details: The loans students take are unforgiving and limit who can begin to consider a university education. Additionally, the USA's recent hostility towards university students has toppled the world’s leading education hub; for the UK, this presents an opportunity. With world-class universities already, a more inviting student loan programme may propel the best talent into the best institutions. A reassessment of student loans benefits the UK's youth and the nation’s interests on an international stage.
attributes.background: We would like the government to reconsider: the threshold at which student loans begin to be repaid; the interest paid on student loans; and the number of years until student loans are written off.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign these petitions which call for similar actions:

Launch a review into student finance maintenance loan thresholds - https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/751019

Review the student loan system and explore alternatives - https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757658
